hero_subtitle: Elegant, indulgent and utterly British — afternoon tea catering for celebrations and special occasions.
samples_intro: A taste of what’s possible. Here’s a recent menu we built around afternoon tea elements — finger sandwiches, mini tartlets, scones with jam and cream, followed by something more substantial. Tap to expand.
cta_subtitle: Tell us about your event and we will create a menu that works perfectly for you.

samples.title: Afternoon Tea Canapés & Sharing Pies
samples.blurb: A very English reception. Pimms served on the lawn behind the manor house, and afternoon tea in miniature passed for the guests to nibble on: finger sandwiches, mini quiche Lorraine, leek & parmesan tartlets, mini scones with jam & cream. The family style meal was then served in a marquee on the edge of a wood.

items: Baskets of crostini and rustic breads served with home cured beetroot stained gravadlax with dill & mustard cream cheese
Mozzarella with extra virgin olive oil, lemon zest & chilli flakes
Vine tomatoes with extra virgin olive oil, Maldon salt & fresh basil
Chicken, chorizo & roasted pepper pie with a filo crust
Sweet potato, wild mushroom & spinach pie with a puff pastry crust (V)
Green beans & mangetout with toasted hazelnuts & orange
Mixed leaves with pomegranate seeds and a pomegranate & honey dressing
Village fete style cakes, bars & biscuits served with cream & raspberry coulis
